creator: kakehi@kme.co.jp
text:
6.2-PRERELEASE(RC1) can't find SATA 2nd ch's drive.
6.1-Stable (Sep.2006) can find SATA 2nd ch's drive as ad10. 
If force boot from SATA-2nd (by BIOS setting), 6.2-PRERELEASE can boot,
but can't find ad10.
ad8(SATA ch0:ata4) and ad10(SATA ch1:ata5) has same disklabels.

# /dev/ad8s1:
8 partitions:
#        size   offset    fstype   [fsize bsize bps/cpg]
  a:  1048576        0    4.2BSD     2048 16384     8
  b:  2044560  1048576      swap
  c: 625137282        0    unused        0     0         # "raw" part, don't edit
  d:  3119104  3093136    4.2BSD     2048 16384 28552
  e:  1048576  6212240    4.2BSD     2048 16384     8
  f: 16777216  7260816    4.2BSD     2048 16384 28552
  g: 601099250 24038032    4.2BSD     2048 16384 28552

d,f,g partitions are gmirrored, and e partition are gstriped.
ccd1,ccd2 are constructed on PATA.

My kernel is GENERIC + ccd,vlan. 

  CPU: Celeron D352
  M/B: ASRock 775Dual-VSTA VIA PT880/VT8237A

dmesg is

Nothing.
How-To-Repeat: Every time.
